career_direction: Python backend engineer and AI/ML product developer, targeting mid-level roles in London or remote UK. Building on applied experience with FastAPI, Django, PyTorch, Hugging Face, and agent-based applications.
hard_constraints: Must be a software-engineering, backend, AI/ML, or data-engineering role
Must use Python as a primary or significant language
Must operate in London or accept remote UK candidates
Must not require existing security clearance

evidence.label: Pharmax AI product
evidence.content: Built and deployed a FastAPI microservice for drug interaction prediction using Hugging Face transformers. Trained and fine-tuned models. Integrated with existing Django monolith.

evidence.label: Vigilis platform
evidence.content: Developed dashboard and alerting features in a Django and React application for a compliance SaaS product. Used PostgreSQL, Redis, and Celery.

evidence.label: Bucca Hut ordering system
evidence.content: Contributed to a FastAPI ordering backend and React admin panel for a restaurant group. Handled Stripe payments and menu management.

evidence.label: Haxaml agent framework
evidence.content: Designed and built an LLM agent harness in Python with tool dispatch, context assembly, and structured output. Used Pydantic for message and event contracts.

work_authorization: UK right to work — no sponsorship required
